messages.text: Hi! I found you through a friend who got married last year. I'm getting married in Mallorca in September and I'm looking for a bespoke dress
Hello! How exciting — Mallorca in September sounds beautiful 🤍 Tell me a bit about what you have in mind for the dress
I want something very minimal and Mediterranean. Nothing too structured — I'm thinking column silhouette, maybe crepe. And I want it to feel light, not bridal in a traditional sense
I love that direction — a column in crepe is effortlessly elegant and perfect for an outdoor Mediterranean setting. Do you have any back detail in mind?
Actually yes — I want the back to be the statement. Maybe a deep open back or a draped detail. The front can be very clean
Beautiful contrast — minimal front, all the drama in the back. What's your budget range?
Around €2,800. Is that workable for crepe with a back detail?
Yes, absolutely workable. When is the wedding exactly — I want to make sure we have enough time for fittings
September 5th. I know it's not a lot of time but I just found your work and I really want it to be you
We'd need to move quickly but it's doable. Let's set up a first session this week so we can assess the timeline properly 🤍

brief.escote: Frontal limpio, espalda escotada como elemento principal
alertas: Timeline muy ajustado — boda el 5 sep, solo ~5 meses desde abril
Novia en el extranjero — coordinar pruebas (posible desplazamiento)
